updates.name: OpenAI Superapp (ChatGPT + Codex + Atlas)
updates.description: OpenAI is merging ChatGPT, its Codex coding agent, and the Atlas web browser into a single desktop superapp. Announced March 20, this consolidation aims to create one unified AI workspace that can chat, code, browse, and automate tasks on your computer.

updates.name: Meta Manus Desktop (My Computer)
updates.description: Meta's Manus AI agent now runs locally on Mac and Windows via a new 'My Computer' feature. It can read, edit, and manage local files and control desktop apps autonomously — marking a major shift from cloud-only AI agents to on-device automation.

updates.name: Microsoft Copilot Cowork (Wave 3)
updates.description: Microsoft's Wave 3 update brings 'Work IQ' and agentic Copilot capabilities to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook. Built in collaboration with Anthropic, Copilot Cowork lets AI agents autonomously handle complex multi-step tasks across your Microsoft 365 apps.

updates.name: GStack
updates.description: Open-source Claude Code workflow by YC's Garry Tan that turns AI into a structured dev team with slash commands for planning, code review, QA, shipping, and browser testing. Hit 10K GitHub stars in 48 hours — Tan reports averaging 10K lines of code per week with it.

updates.name: Alibaba Wukong
updates.description: Alibaba's new enterprise AI agent platform coordinates multiple agents through a single interface for document editing, approvals, meeting transcription, and research. Integrates with DingTalk now, with Slack and Teams support coming soon.

updates.name: LTX-2.3
updates.description: Lightricks' open-source 22B-parameter video model generates native 4K video at 50 FPS with synchronized audio in a single pass. Supports up to 20-second clips, portrait mode, and runs locally on consumer hardware. Released under Apache 2.0.

updates.name: Luma Agents
updates.description: Luma's new AI agents handle end-to-end creative production across text, images, video, and audio, powered by the Uni-1 unified multimodal model. Already adopted by agencies like Publicis Groupe and brands like Adidas.

updates.name: Helios (ByteDance + Peking University + Canva)
updates.description: A 14B-parameter autoregressive diffusion model for text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video tasks. Open-sourced under Apache 2.0, it represents a strong collaboration between academia and industry for accessible video generation.

updates.name: Perplexity Personal Computer
updates.description: Perplexity introduced a Mac mini-based hardware device designed to run continuously as your always-on digital AI assistant. It's a dedicated physical computer for AI-first workflows — a bold bet on AI hardware.

updates.name: Baidu Browser Agents
updates.description: Baidu built a system to run AI agents instantly in any browser with zero setup — no servers, no API keys, no installation. Just open a tab and deploy an agent. A remarkably frictionless approach to agentic AI.
